name: Lemon Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together butter and granulated sugar until creamy and smooth.
2. Add egg, lemon juice, and grated lemon rind to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt until combined.
4. Place crushed cereal flakes on a plate (about 1-1/4 cups).
5. Drop teaspoonfuls of cookie batter onto the cereal flakes, tossing to coat each one evenly.
6. Transfer cookies to an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 15 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and place on a wire rack to cool.
